title: Cobblemon Botany Pots
body:
🌿 Cobblemon Botany Integration

Grow, harvest, and automate your Pokémon plants!

⚙️ About the Mod

Cobblemon Botany Integration brings the best of both worlds — the automation power of Botany Pots and the natural diversity of Cobblemon!

With this add-on, you can now grow Cobblemon berries, seeds, and special plants directly inside Botany Pots, making your Pokémon farming easier, cleaner, and fully automatable.

Create your own Pokémon greenhouse, harvest your favorite berries, and keep your base looking beautiful while staying efficient!

🌱 Features

  • 🌿 Full Botany Pots integration — all Cobblemon growable items are compatible
  • 🍓 Grow Pokémon berries automatically in pots
  • 💧 Supports soil and growth requirements from both mods
  • 🧰 Easy setup — just install and start planting!
  • ⚡ Perfect for automation setups using hoppers, pipes, or modded item systems

🧩 Compatibility

  • ✅ Cobblemon (Required)
  • ✅ Botany Pots (Required)
  • ⚙️ Works on Minecraft 1.21.1+
  • 🔧 Supports NeoForge and Fabric mod loaders

📦 Installation

  1. Make sure you have Cobblemon and Botany Pots installed.
  2. Download Cobblemon Botany Integration.
  3. Drop the .jar file into your mods folder.
  4. Launch Minecraft and start planting! 🌾

💡 Example Uses

  • Build an automated berry farm for Pokéballs.
  • Create decorative Pokémon gardens with growing berries.
  • Combine with other automation mods to make full auto-harvest systems!

 

💖 Credits

  • Cobblemon Team – for the amazing Pokémon mod
  • Darkhax & Team – creators of Botany Pots
  • Cobblemore Studio – integration and development

✨ Grow your Pokémon world — one berry at a time! 🍇
